---
title: "什么是圆锥曲线 — 平面切圆锥"
subtitle: "模块一 · 第1课"
date: 2026-03-22
---

## 一段跨越两千年的故事

圆锥曲线的历史，本身就是一部数学思想演进史：

| 年代 | 人物 | 贡献 |
|------|------|------|
| 约前350年 | **梅内赫莫斯**（Menaechmus） | 为了解决"倍立方"问题（用尺规构造 $\sqrt[3]{2}$），首次研究了圆锥截面 |
| 约前200年 | **阿波罗尼乌斯**（Apollonius） | 写成八卷《圆锥曲线论》，系统命名了椭圆(ellipse)、抛物线(parabola)、双曲线(hyperbola) |
| 1609年 | **开普勒**（Kepler） | 发现行星轨道是椭圆形的——太阳位于一个焦点（开普勒第一定律） |
| 1822年 | **丹德兰**（Dandelin） | 用锥内切球（Dandelin球）给出了"为什么截面是椭圆"的优美几何证明 |

开普勒在1609年发现行星轨道是椭圆形的。但早在两千年前，古希腊数学家阿波罗尼乌斯就已经知道：只需要一个圆锥和一把刀，就能切出四种美丽的曲线。我们今天就来"看见"这个过程。

## 探索问题

::: {.callout-tip}
## 先想一想

拿一个冰淇淋甜筒（圆锥），用一把刀去切它。如果刀的角度不同，切出来的截面形状一样吗？你觉得能切出几种不同的曲线？

试着在纸上画一画，然后再看下面的动画。
:::

## 几何直觉：平面切圆锥

我们用一个动画来展示这个过程。拖动滑块改变切面角度，观察截面曲线如何从圆变为椭圆、抛物线、双曲线。

### 3D交互：用平面切双圆锥

用鼠标拖动旋转视角，滚轮缩放。拖动下方滑块改变切面倾斜角度，观察截面曲线（亮黄色高亮）如何变化。

```{=html}
<div class="three-container" id="three_cone_slice">
  <div class="three-info" id="three_cone_slice_info">圆</div>
</div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>切面角度：</label>
  <input type="range" id="three_cone_slice_angle" min="0" max="100" value="15" step="1">
  <span class="value-display" id="three_cone_slice_label">圆</span>
</div>
<script type="module">
import * as THREE from 'three';
import { OrbitControls } from 'three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js';

(function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('three_cone_slice');
  const infoEl = document.getElementById('three_cone_slice_info');
  const slider = document.getElementById('three_cone_slice_angle');
  const labelEl = document.getElementById('three_cone_slice_label');

  // --- Renderer ---
  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: false });
  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
  renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight);
  renderer.setClearColor(0x1a1a2e);
  container.appendChild(renderer.domElement);

  // --- Scene & Camera ---
  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight, 0.1, 100);
  camera.position.set(4, 3, 5);
  camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

  // --- OrbitControls ---
  const controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
  controls.enableDamping = true;
  controls.dampingFactor = 0.08;

  // --- Lights ---
  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.5));
  const dirLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.8);
  dirLight.position.set(5, 8, 5);
  scene.add(dirLight);

  // --- Double cone (hourglass) built from parametric geometry ---
  // Cone surface: x² + z² = (y·tan(α))², apex at origin
  const coneHalfAngle = Math.PI / 6; // 30 degrees
  const coneHeight = 3.0;
  const tanA = Math.tan(coneHalfAngle);
  const coneSegs = 64;
  const coneRings = 32;

  function buildConeGeo(yMin, yMax) {
    const geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    const verts = [], indices = [];
    for (let j = 0; j <= coneRings; j++) {
      const t = j / coneRings;
      const y = yMin + t * (yMax - yMin);
      const r = Math.abs(y) * tanA;
      for (let i = 0; i <= coneSegs; i++) {
        const phi = (i / coneSegs) * Math.PI * 2;
        verts.push(r * Math.cos(phi), y, r * Math.sin(phi));
      }
    }
    for (let j = 0; j < coneRings; j++) {
      for (let i = 0; i < coneSegs; i++) {
        const a = j * (coneSegs + 1) + i;
        const b = a + 1;
        const c = a + coneSegs + 1;
        const d = c + 1;
        indices.push(a, c, b, b, c, d);
      }
    }
    geo.setAttribute('position', new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(verts, 3));
    geo.setIndex(indices);
    geo.computeVertexNormals();
    return geo;
  }

  const upperGeo = buildConeGeo(0.001, coneHeight);
  const lowerGeo = buildConeGeo(-coneHeight, -0.001);

  const coneMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0xc8a87c,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.3,
    side: THREE.DoubleSide,
    depthWrite: false
  });
  scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(upperGeo, coneMat));
  scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(lowerGeo, coneMat));

  // Wireframe overlay
  const wireMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x8b7355, wireframe: true, transparent: true, opacity: 0.15 });
  scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(upperGeo.clone(), wireMat));
  scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(lowerGeo.clone(), wireMat));

  // Cone axis line
  const axisGeo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(0, -coneHeight - 0.3, 0), new THREE.Vector3(0, coneHeight + 0.3, 0)]);
  scene.add(new THREE.Line(axisGeo, new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x555555, transparent: true, opacity: 0.5 })));

  // --- Slicing plane ---
  const planeSize = 4.5;
  const planeGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(planeSize, planeSize);
  const planeMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0x4488ff,
    transparent: true,
    opacity: 0.25,
    side: THREE.DoubleSide,
    depthWrite: false
  });
  const planeMesh = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeo, planeMat);
  scene.add(planeMesh);

  // --- Intersection curve ---
  const curvePoints = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 401; i++) curvePoints.push(new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0));
  const curveGeo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(curvePoints);
  const curveMat = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x44ff44, linewidth: 2 });
  const curveLine = new THREE.Line(curveGeo, curveMat);
  scene.add(curveLine);

  // Glow tube for curve
  const tubeCurveGroup = new THREE.Group();
  scene.add(tubeCurveGroup);

  // --- Compute intersection ---
  // Cone: x^2 + z^2 = (y * tan(alpha))^2  (double cone, y can be + or -)
  // Plane: rotated around z-axis by angle theta, with offset
  // We'll parameterize: plane normal = (sin(theta), cos(theta), 0), plane passes through (0, d, 0)
  // Equation: x*sin(theta) + y*cos(theta) = d

  function computeIntersection(theta, planeD) {
    // theta: angle of plane normal from vertical (0 = horizontal plane, pi/2 = vertical)
    // For each angle phi around the cone, find y where cone meets plane
    const tanA = Math.tan(coneHalfAngle);
    const sinT = Math.sin(theta);
    const cosT = Math.cos(theta);
    const points = [];
    const N = 400;

    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
      const phi = (i / N) * 2 * Math.PI;
      const cosPhi = Math.cos(phi);
      const sinPhi = Math.sin(phi);

      // On cone surface: x = r*cos(phi), z = r*sin(phi), r = |y|*tan(alpha)
      // So x = y*tan(alpha)*cos(phi) for upper cone (y>0), x = -y*tan(alpha)*cos(phi) for lower (y<0)
      // Plane: x*sin(theta) + y*cos(theta) = d
      // Substitute: y*tanA*cosPhi*sinT + y*cosT = d  (for y>0)
      //            -y*tanA*cosPhi*sinT + y*cosT = d  (for y<0, with y = -|y|)
      // Actually let's do both branches

      // Upper cone (y >= 0): r = y * tanA
      // x = r*cosPhi = y*tanA*cosPhi
      // Plane: y*tanA*cosPhi*sinT + y*cosT = d
      // y*(tanA*cosPhi*sinT + cosT) = d
      const denomUpper = tanA * cosPhi * sinT + cosT;
      if (Math.abs(denomUpper) > 1e-8) {
        const yU = planeD / denomUpper;
        if (yU >= 0 && yU <= coneHeight) {
          const rU = yU * tanA;
          points.push(new THREE.Vector3(rU * cosPhi, yU, rU * sinPhi));
          continue;
        }
      }

      // Lower cone (y <= 0): r = -y * tanA (since y<0)
      // x = r*cosPhi = -y*tanA*cosPhi
      // Plane: -y*tanA*cosPhi*sinT + y*cosT = d
      // y*(-tanA*cosPhi*sinT + cosT) = d
      const denomLower = -tanA * cosPhi * sinT + cosT;
      if (Math.abs(denomLower) > 1e-8) {
        const yL = planeD / denomLower;
        if (yL <= 0 && yL >= -coneHeight) {
          const rL = -yL * tanA;
          points.push(new THREE.Vector3(rL * cosPhi, yL, rL * sinPhi));
          continue;
        }
      }

      // No intersection for this phi
      points.push(null);
    }

    return points;
  }

  function updateScene(val) {
    // val 0-100 maps to plane tilt
    // 0-15: circle (theta near 0)
    // 16-55: ellipse
    // 56-65: parabola (theta = coneHalfAngle)
    // 66-100: hyperbola (theta > coneHalfAngle)

    let theta, typeName, planeD;
    const alpha = coneHalfAngle; // ~0.5236

    if (val <= 15) {
      theta = (val / 15) * alpha * 0.3;
      typeName = '圆';
      planeD = 1.5;
    } else if (val <= 55) {
      const t = (val - 16) / 39;
      theta = alpha * (0.3 + t * 0.65);
      typeName = '椭圆';
      planeD = 1.5;
    } else if (val <= 65) {
      const t = (val - 56) / 9;
      theta = alpha * (0.95 + t * 0.05);
      typeName = '抛物线';
      planeD = 1.2;
    } else {
      const t = (val - 66) / 34;
      theta = alpha * (1.05 + t * 0.6);
      typeName = '双曲线';
      planeD = 0.8 - t * 0.3;
    }

    // Update plane orientation
    planeMesh.rotation.set(0, 0, 0);
    planeMesh.position.set(0, 0, 0);
    // The default PlaneGeometry faces +Z. We want it to represent the equation:
    // x*sin(theta) + y*cos(theta) = d
    // Normal = (sin(theta), cos(theta), 0)
    // Default normal is (0,0,1), so rotate around X by -pi/2, then around Z by (pi/2 - theta)
    // Simpler: set normal directly
    const normal = new THREE.Vector3(Math.sin(theta), Math.cos(theta), 0);
    const quat = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromUnitVectors(new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 1), normal);
    planeMesh.quaternion.copy(quat);
    planeMesh.position.copy(normal.clone().multiplyScalar(planeD));

    // Compute intersection
    const pts = computeIntersection(theta, planeD);
    const validPts = pts.filter(p => p !== null);

    // Update curve geometry
    const pos = curveGeo.attributes.position;
    for (let i = 0; i < 400; i++) {
      if (i < validPts.length) {
        pos.setXYZ(i, validPts[i].x, validPts[i].y, validPts[i].z);
      } else if (validPts.length > 0) {
        const last = validPts[validPts.length - 1];
        pos.setXYZ(i, last.x, last.y, last.z);
      }
    }
    // Close the loop if it's a closed curve
    if (validPts.length > 2) {
      pos.setXYZ(400, validPts[0].x, validPts[0].y, validPts[0].z);
    }
    pos.needsUpdate = true;
    curveGeo.setDrawRange(0, Math.min(validPts.length + 1, 401));

    // Glow tube
    tubeCurveGroup.clear();
    if (validPts.length > 3) {
      try {
        // For hyperbola, split into branches
        if (typeName === '双曲线') {
          const branches = splitBranches(validPts);
          branches.forEach(branch => {
            if (branch.length > 3) {
              const curve3 = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(branch, false);
              const tubeGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(curve3, 80, 0.03, 8, false);
              const tubeMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffff00 });
              tubeCurveGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(tubeGeo, tubeMat));
            }
          });
        } else {
          const curve3 = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(validPts, true);
          const tubeGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(curve3, 120, 0.03, 8, true);
          const tubeMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffff00 });
          tubeCurveGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(tubeGeo, tubeMat));
        }
      } catch(e) { /* skip if tube fails */ }
    }

    infoEl.textContent = typeName;
    labelEl.textContent = typeName;
  }

  function splitBranches(pts) {
    // Split points into branches based on large gaps
    const branches = [[]];
    for (let i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
      if (i > 0) {
        const d = pts[i].distanceTo(pts[i-1]);
        if (d > 0.5) {
          branches.push([]);
        }
      }
      branches[branches.length - 1].push(pts[i]);
    }
    return branches.filter(b => b.length > 2);
  }

  slider.addEventListener('input', () => updateScene(+slider.value));
  updateScene(+slider.value);

  // --- Animation loop ---
  function animate() {
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    controls.update();
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
  }
  animate();

  // --- Resize ---
  const ro = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    const w = container.clientWidth, h = container.clientHeight;
    if (w === 0 || h === 0) return;
    camera.aspect = w / h;
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
    renderer.setSize(w, h);
  });
  ro.observe(container);
})();
</script>
```

拖动滑块，观察：

- **水平切** → 圆
- **倾斜切**（比锥面缓）→ 椭圆
- **平行于锥面切** → 抛物线
- **比锥面更陡** → 双曲线

这四种曲线，统称为**圆锥曲线**。

### Dandelin球：为什么截面是椭圆

1822年，比利时数学家丹德兰（Dandelin）给出了一个极其优美的证明：在圆锥内部放入两个与截面相切的球（Dandelin球），球与截面的切点恰好就是椭圆的两个焦点！

下面的3D场景展示了这个构造。点P沿椭圆移动时，$|PF_1| + |PF_2|$ 始终保持不变——这正是椭圆的定义。

```{=html}
<div class="three-container" id="three_dandelin">
  <div class="three-info" id="three_dandelin_info">拖动下方滑块移动点P</div>
</div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>点P位置：</label>
  <input type="range" id="dandelin_p_slider" min="0" max="360" value="0" step="1">
  <span class="value-display" id="dandelin_readout">|PF₁|=? |PF₂|=? 和=?</span>
</div>
<script type="module">
import * as THREE from 'three';
import { OrbitControls } from 'three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js';

(function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('three_dandelin');
  const infoEl = document.getElementById('three_dandelin_info');
  const slider = document.getElementById('dandelin_p_slider');
  const readoutEl = document.getElementById('dandelin_readout');

  // --- Renderer ---
  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: false });
  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
  renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight);
  renderer.setClearColor(0x1a1a2e);
  renderer.sortObjects = true;
  container.appendChild(renderer.domElement);

  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight, 0.1, 100);
  camera.position.set(6, 4, 6);
  camera.lookAt(0, 2.0, 0);

  const controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
  controls.enableDamping = true;
  controls.dampingFactor = 0.08;
  controls.target.set(0, 2.0, 0);

  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.4));
  const dl = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.7);
  dl.position.set(5, 8, 5);
  scene.add(dl);

  // --- Cone (parametric, apex at origin y=0) ---
  const alpha = Math.PI / 6; // half-angle 30 deg
  const coneH = 5;
  const tanAlpha = Math.tan(alpha);
  const cSegs = 64, cRings = 32;

  function buildDandelinCone(yMin, yMax) {
    const geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    const verts = [], idx = [];
    for (let j = 0; j <= cRings; j++) {
      const y = yMin + (j / cRings) * (yMax - yMin);
      const r = Math.abs(y) * tanAlpha;
      for (let i = 0; i <= cSegs; i++) {
        const phi = (i / cSegs) * Math.PI * 2;
        verts.push(r * Math.cos(phi), y, r * Math.sin(phi));
      }
    }
    for (let j = 0; j < cRings; j++) {
      for (let i = 0; i < cSegs; i++) {
        const a = j * (cSegs + 1) + i, b = a + 1, c = a + cSegs + 1, d = c + 1;
        idx.push(a, c, b, b, c, d);
      }
    }
    geo.setAttribute('position', new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(verts, 3));
    geo.setIndex(idx);
    geo.computeVertexNormals();
    return geo;
  }

  const dandelinConeGeo = buildDandelinCone(0.01, coneH);
  const coneMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0xc8a87c, transparent: true, opacity: 0.15, side: THREE.DoubleSide, depthWrite: false
  });
  const coneMesh = new THREE.Mesh(dandelinConeGeo, coneMat);
  coneMesh.renderOrder = 0;
  scene.add(coneMesh);
  const wireM = new THREE.Mesh(dandelinConeGeo.clone(), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
    color: 0x8b7355, wireframe: true, transparent: true, opacity: 0.12
  }));
  wireM.renderOrder = 0;
  scene.add(wireM);

  // --- Slicing plane for ellipse ---
  // Plane tilt: choose theta for a clearly elongated ellipse
  const theta = alpha * 0.75; // tilt angle of plane normal from y-axis (~22.5°)
  const planeD = 1.5; // plane offset (smaller to keep spheres inside cone)
  const tanA = Math.tan(alpha);
  const sinT = Math.sin(theta);
  const cosT = Math.cos(theta);

  const planeGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(5, 5);
  const planeMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0x4488ff, transparent: true, opacity: 0.2, side: THREE.DoubleSide, depthWrite: false
  });
  const planeMesh = new THREE.Mesh(planeGeo, planeMat);
  const pNormal = new THREE.Vector3(sinT, cosT, 0);
  const quat = new THREE.Quaternion().setFromUnitVectors(new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 1), pNormal);
  planeMesh.quaternion.copy(quat);
  planeMesh.position.copy(pNormal.clone().multiplyScalar(planeD));
  scene.add(planeMesh);

  // --- Compute ellipse on cone-plane intersection ---
  function getEllipsePoint(phi) {
    const cosPhi = Math.cos(phi);
    const sinPhi = Math.sin(phi);
    const denom = tanA * cosPhi * sinT + cosT;
    if (Math.abs(denom) < 1e-8) return null;
    const y = planeD / denom;
    if (y < 0 || y > coneH) return null;
    const r = y * tanA;
    return new THREE.Vector3(r * cosPhi, y, r * sinPhi);
  }

  const ellipsePoints = [];
  const N = 360;
  for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
    const phi = (i / N) * 2 * Math.PI;
    const p = getEllipsePoint(phi);
    if (p) ellipsePoints.push({ phi, pt: p });
  }

  // Draw ellipse curve with tube
  if (ellipsePoints.length > 3) {
    const pts3 = ellipsePoints.map(e => e.pt);
    const curve3 = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(pts3, true);
    const tubeGeo = new THREE.TubeGeometry(curve3, 120, 0.025, 8, true);
    scene.add(new THREE.Mesh(tubeGeo, new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x44ff44 })));
  }

  // --- Dandelin spheres ---
  // The two Dandelin spheres are tangent to the cone and to the cutting plane.
  // For a cone with apex at origin, half-angle alpha, plane: x*sinT + y*cosT = d
  // The sphere center lies on the y-axis (by symmetry for this setup).
  // Sphere tangent to cone: center at (0, yc, 0), radius = yc * sin(alpha) (inscribed in cone)
  // Sphere tangent to plane: distance from center to plane = radius
  // Distance from (0, yc, 0) to plane x*sinT + y*cosT = d  is  |yc*cosT - d|
  // So |yc*cosT - d| = yc*sin(alpha)
  // Case 1 (upper sphere): yc*cosT - d = -yc*sin(alpha)  →  yc*(cosT + sinA) = d  →  yc = d/(cosT + sinA)
  // Case 2 (lower sphere): yc*cosT - d = yc*sin(alpha)   →  yc*(cosT - sinA) = d  →  yc = d/(cosT - sinA)

  const sinA = Math.sin(alpha);
  const yc1 = planeD / (cosT + sinA); // smaller sphere (closer to apex)
  const yc2 = planeD / (cosT - sinA); // larger sphere (farther from apex)
  const r1 = yc1 * sinA;
  const r2 = yc2 * sinA;

  // Sphere 1 (smaller, closer to apex)
  const sphere1Geo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(r1, 32, 32);
  const sphereMat1 = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0xff4422, transparent: true, opacity: 0.65,
    side: THREE.FrontSide, depthWrite: true
  });
  const sphere1 = new THREE.Mesh(sphere1Geo, sphereMat1);
  sphere1.position.set(0, yc1, 0);
  sphere1.renderOrder = 1;
  scene.add(sphere1);

  // Sphere 2 (larger, farther from apex)
  const sphere2Geo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(r2, 32, 32);
  const sphereMat2 = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
    color: 0xff4422, transparent: true, opacity: 0.65,
    side: THREE.FrontSide, depthWrite: true
  });
  const sphere2 = new THREE.Mesh(sphere2Geo, sphereMat2);
  sphere2.position.set(0, yc2, 0);
  sphere2.renderOrder = 1;
  scene.add(sphere2);

  // Sphere wireframe outlines for visibility
  const sphereWire = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff6644, wireframe: true, transparent: true, opacity: 0.3 });
  const sw1 = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(r1, 16, 16), sphereWire);
  sw1.position.set(0, yc1, 0);
  scene.add(sw1);
  const sw2 = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(r2, 16, 16), sphereWire);
  sw2.position.set(0, yc2, 0);
  scene.add(sw2);

  // --- Foci: where spheres touch the plane ---
  // The tangent point is where the line from the sphere center perpendicular to the plane hits the plane.
  // F = center + radius * (-normal_toward_plane)
  // For sphere1: distance = d - yc1*cosT (positive means plane is on the +normal side)
  // Actually: signed distance = (0*sinT + yc1*cosT - d) = yc1*cosT - d
  // For sphere1: yc1*cosT - d = yc1*(cosT) - d. Since yc1 = d/(cosT+sinA), this = d*cosT/(cosT+sinA) - d = d*(cosT - cosT - sinA)/(cosT+sinA) = -d*sinA/(cosT+sinA)
  // So the focus is: center + (signed_dist)*normal  => but we go from center toward plane
  // F1 = (0, yc1, 0) - (signed_dist) * normal_hat  ... let me just compute directly
  // F = center - signed_distance * normal
  const sd1 = yc1 * cosT - planeD; // negative
  const f1 = new THREE.Vector3(0, yc1, 0).add(pNormal.clone().multiplyScalar(-sd1));
  // Wait, F = center - sd * normal => center is (0,yc1,0), normal is (sinT, cosT, 0)
  // Actually: the closest point on the plane from center is: center - sd * normal
  const f1Pos = new THREE.Vector3(-sd1 * sinT, yc1 - sd1 * cosT, 0);

  const sd2 = yc2 * cosT - planeD;
  const f2Pos = new THREE.Vector3(-sd2 * sinT, yc2 - sd2 * cosT, 0);

  // Focus dots (large, bright, always visible)
  const focusMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff0000 });
  const focusGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.12, 16, 16);
  const f1Mesh = new THREE.Mesh(focusGeo, focusMat);
  f1Mesh.position.copy(f1Pos);
  f1Mesh.renderOrder = 2;
  scene.add(f1Mesh);
  const f2Mesh = new THREE.Mesh(focusGeo.clone(), focusMat);
  f2Mesh.position.copy(f2Pos);
  f2Mesh.renderOrder = 2;
  scene.add(f2Mesh);

  // Lines from sphere centers to foci (show tangency)
  const tangentLineMat = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff6644 });
  const tl1Geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(0, yc1, 0), f1Pos]);
  scene.add(new THREE.Line(tl1Geo, tangentLineMat));
  const tl2Geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(0, yc2, 0), f2Pos]);
  scene.add(new THREE.Line(tl2Geo, tangentLineMat));

  // Focus labels
  function makeLabel(text, position) {
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = 128; canvas.height = 64;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ff4444';
    ctx.font = 'bold 40px sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText(text, 64, 45);
    const tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
    const mat = new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: tex, transparent: true });
    const sprite = new THREE.Sprite(mat);
    sprite.position.copy(position).add(new THREE.Vector3(0, 0.2, 0));
    sprite.scale.set(0.5, 0.25, 1);
    return sprite;
  }
  scene.add(makeLabel('F₁', f1Pos));
  scene.add(makeLabel('F₂', f2Pos));

  // --- Movable point P ---
  const pMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffff00 });
  const pGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 16, 16);
  const pMesh = new THREE.Mesh(pGeo, pMat);
  scene.add(pMesh);

  // Lines from P to F1 and F2
  const lineMat1 = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff8888 });
  const lineGeo1 = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3()]);
  const line1 = new THREE.Line(lineGeo1, lineMat1);
  scene.add(line1);

  const lineMat2 = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0x88ff88 });
  const lineGeo2 = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3()]);
  const line2 = new THREE.Line(lineGeo2, lineMat2);
  scene.add(line2);

  function updateP(deg) {
    const phi = deg * Math.PI / 180;
    const p = getEllipsePoint(phi);
    if (!p) return;

    pMesh.position.copy(p);

    // Update lines
    const pos1 = line1.geometry.attributes.position;
    pos1.setXYZ(0, p.x, p.y, p.z);
    pos1.setXYZ(1, f1Pos.x, f1Pos.y, f1Pos.z);
    pos1.needsUpdate = true;

    const pos2 = line2.geometry.attributes.position;
    pos2.setXYZ(0, p.x, p.y, p.z);
    pos2.setXYZ(1, f2Pos.x, f2Pos.y, f2Pos.z);
    pos2.needsUpdate = true;

    const d1 = p.distanceTo(f1Pos);
    const d2 = p.distanceTo(f2Pos);
    readoutEl.textContent = `|PF₁|=${d1.toFixed(2)}  |PF₂|=${d2.toFixed(2)}  和=${(d1 + d2).toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  slider.addEventListener('input', () => updateP(+slider.value));
  updateP(0);

  function animate() {
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    controls.update();
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
  }
  animate();

  const ro = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    const w = container.clientWidth, h = container.clientHeight;
    if (w === 0 || h === 0) return;
    camera.aspect = w / h;
    camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
    renderer.setSize(w, h);
  });
  ro.observe(container);
})();
</script>
```

拖动滑块让点P沿椭圆运动，观察右边的数据：无论P在椭圆上的什么位置，$|PF_1| + |PF_2|$ 始终相等！这就是椭圆的焦点距离和恒定性质——而Dandelin球的构造直接证明了这一点。

::: {.callout-note}
## Dandelin证明的核心思想

设点P在椭圆上，从P沿锥面作母线到达上方切圆 $c_1$ 的交点为 $T_1$，下方切圆 $c_2$ 的交点为 $T_2$。

- $|PF_1| = |PT_1|$（从外点到球的两条切线段相等）
- $|PF_2| = |PT_2|$（同理）
- 所以 $|PF_1| + |PF_2| = |PT_1| + |PT_2|$ = 两切圆之间沿母线的距离（常数！）

这就完美解释了为什么截面曲线满足椭圆的定义。
:::

### 3Blue1Brown视频讲解

3Blue1Brown的Grant Sanderson制作了一期精彩的Dandelin球可视化讲解，强烈推荐观看：

```{=html}
<div class="video-container">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/pQa_tWZmlGs" title="3Blue1Brown: Why slicing a cone gives an ellipse" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;"></iframe>
</div>
```

### 动画1：切面角度与曲线类型（2D示意）

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_cone_slice"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>切面角度：</label>
  <input type="range" id="m1_cone_slice_angle" min="0" max="100" value="20" step="1">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_cone_slice_label">椭圆</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 450;
  const svg = d3.select("#m1_cone_slice").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`);

  const coneApex = {x: 350, y: 40};
  const coneBaseY = 410;
  const coneHalfWidth = 160;
  const coneLeftBase = {x: coneApex.x - coneHalfWidth, y: coneBaseY};
  const coneRightBase = {x: coneApex.x + coneHalfWidth, y: coneBaseY};

  // Cone body (triangle)
  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", `M${coneApex.x},${coneApex.y} L${coneLeftBase.x},${coneLeftBase.y} L${coneRightBase.x},${coneRightBase.y} Z`)
    .attr("fill", "#e8d5b7").attr("stroke", "#8b7355").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("opacity", 0.6);

  // Cone outline
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", coneApex.x).attr("y1", coneApex.y)
    .attr("x2", coneLeftBase.x).attr("y2", coneLeftBase.y)
    .attr("stroke", "#8b7355").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", coneApex.x).attr("y1", coneApex.y)
    .attr("x2", coneRightBase.x).attr("y2", coneRightBase.y)
    .attr("stroke", "#8b7355").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // Cutting plane line
  const cutLine = svg.append("line")
    .attr("stroke", "#c74440").attr("stroke-width", 3).attr("stroke-dasharray", "8,4");

  // Intersection curve highlight
  const curveHighlight = svg.append("path")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 4);

  // Label
  const typeLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", 600).attr("y", 60).attr("font-size", "22px").attr("font-weight", "bold")
    .attr("fill", "#2d70b3").attr("text-anchor", "middle");

  const descLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", 600).attr("y", 90).attr("font-size", "14px")
    .attr("fill", "#555").attr("text-anchor", "middle");

  // Cone half-angle (from vertical)
  const coneAngle = Math.atan2(coneHalfWidth, coneBaseY - coneApex.y);

  function lerp(a, b, t) { return a + (b - a) * t; }

  function getConeXAtY(yVal) {
    const t = (yVal - coneApex.y) / (coneBaseY - coneApex.y);
    return coneHalfWidth * t;
  }

  function update(val) {
    let cutCenterY = 250;
    let cutAngleDeg, typeName, typeDesc;
    let leftX, leftY, rightX, rightY;

    if (val <= 15) {
      typeName = "圆";
      typeDesc = "切面与轴垂直";
      cutAngleDeg = 0;
      const hw = getConeXAtY(cutCenterY);
      leftX = coneApex.x - hw; rightX = coneApex.x + hw;
      leftY = cutCenterY; rightY = cutCenterY;
    } else if (val <= 55) {
      const t = (val - 16) / 39;
      typeName = "椭圆";
      typeDesc = "切面比锥面缓";
      const tiltPx = t * 80;
      leftY = cutCenterY + tiltPx * 0.5;
      rightY = cutCenterY - tiltPx * 0.5;
      leftX = coneApex.x - getConeXAtY(leftY);
      rightX = coneApex.x + getConeXAtY(rightY);
    } else if (val <= 65) {
      typeName = "抛物线";
      typeDesc = "切面与锥面平行";
      const slopeY = coneBaseY - coneApex.y;
      const slopeX = coneHalfWidth;
      leftX = coneApex.x - 120; leftY = 380;
      rightX = coneApex.x + 20; rightY = 100;
    } else {
      const t = (val - 66) / 34;
      typeName = "双曲线";
      typeDesc = "切面比锥面陡";
      leftX = coneApex.x - 60 - t * 40; leftY = 380;
      rightX = coneApex.x + 60 + t * 40; rightY = 80;
    }

    cutLine.attr("x1", leftX).attr("y1", leftY)
      .attr("x2", rightX).attr("y2", rightY);

    typeLabel.text(typeName);
    descLabel.text(typeDesc);

    document.getElementById("m1_cone_slice_label").textContent = typeName;

    const iconCx = 600, iconCy = 180, iconR = 60;
    if (val <= 15) {
      curveHighlight.attr("d", describeArc(iconCx, iconCy, iconR, 0, 359.99));
    } else if (val <= 55) {
      const t = (val - 16) / 39;
      const ry = iconR * (1 - t * 0.6);
      curveHighlight.attr("d", describeEllipse(iconCx, iconCy, iconR, ry));
    } else if (val <= 65) {
      curveHighlight.attr("d", describeParabola(iconCx, iconCy, iconR));
    } else {
      curveHighlight.attr("d", describeHyperbola(iconCx, iconCy, iconR));
    }
  }

  function describeArc(cx, cy, r, startAngle, endAngle) {
    const pts = d3.range(0, 361, 3).map(a => {
      const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
      return [cx + r * Math.cos(rad), cy + r * Math.sin(rad)];
    });
    return d3.line()(pts);
  }

  function describeEllipse(cx, cy, rx, ry) {
    const pts = d3.range(0, 361, 3).map(a => {
      const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
      return [cx + rx * Math.cos(rad), cy + ry * Math.sin(rad)];
    });
    return d3.line()(pts);
  }

  function describeParabola(cx, cy, r) {
    const pts = d3.range(-r, r + 1, 2).map(t => {
      return [cx + t, cy - (t * t) / (r * 0.8) + r * 0.6];
    });
    return d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(pts);
  }

  function describeHyperbola(cx, cy, r) {
    const a = r * 0.4, b = r * 0.5;
    const pts1 = d3.range(-1.8, 1.81, 0.1).map(t => {
      return [cx - a / Math.cosh(t) - a * 0.5, cy + b * Math.tanh(t)];
    });
    const pts2 = d3.range(-1.8, 1.81, 0.1).map(t => {
      return [cx + a / Math.cosh(t) + a * 0.5, cy + b * Math.tanh(t)];
    });
    return d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(pts1) + " " + d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(pts2);
  }

  const slider = document.getElementById("m1_cone_slice_angle");
  slider.addEventListener("input", () => update(+slider.value));
  update(20);
})();
</script>
```

慢慢拖动滑块，观察切面从水平（圆）到倾斜（椭圆）到平行于锥面（抛物线）再到更陡（双曲线）的过程。

### 动画2：三种曲线连续变形

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_morph_curves"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>形状参数：</label>
  <input type="range" id="m1_morph_param" min="0" max="100" value="0" step="1">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_morph_label">圆 (e=0)</span>
  <button id="m1_morph_play">自动播放 ▶</button>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 400, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cx = w / 2, cy = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_morph_curves").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  // Axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ccc").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ccc").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  const curvePath = svg.append("path")
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 3);

  const focusGroup = svg.append("g");
  const eLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "18px").attr("font-weight", "bold").attr("fill", "#c74440");

  const scale = 120;

  function update(val) {
    let e, label;
    if (val <= 40) {
      e = val / 40 * 0.9;
      label = val === 0 ? "圆 (e=0)" : `椭圆 (e=${e.toFixed(2)})`;
    } else if (val <= 60) {
      e = 0.9 + (val - 40) / 20 * 0.1;
      label = e >= 0.99 ? "抛物线 (e≈1)" : `椭圆 (e=${e.toFixed(2)})`;
    } else {
      e = 1.1 + (val - 61) / 39 * 1.9;
      label = `双曲线 (e=${e.toFixed(2)})`;
    }

    document.getElementById("m1_morph_label").textContent = label;
    eLabel.text(`e = ${e.toFixed(2)}`);

    focusGroup.selectAll("*").remove();

    let pts = [];
    if (e < 0.99) {
      const a = scale;
      const b = a * Math.sqrt(1 - e * e);
      const c = a * e;
      pts = d3.range(0, 2 * Math.PI + 0.05, 0.05).map(t => [
        cx + a * Math.cos(t), cy + b * Math.sin(t)
      ]);
      focusGroup.append("circle").attr("cx", cx - c).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
      focusGroup.append("circle").attr("cx", cx + c).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
      focusGroup.append("text").attr("x", cx - c).attr("y", cy + 20).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("F₁");
      focusGroup.append("text").attr("x", cx + c).attr("y", cy + 20).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("F₂");
    } else if (e <= 1.05) {
      const p = scale * 0.5;
      pts = d3.range(-2.5, 2.51, 0.05).map(t => [
        cx + p * t * t, cy + p * 2 * t
      ]);
      focusGroup.append("circle").attr("cx", cx + p).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
      focusGroup.append("text").attr("x", cx + p).attr("y", cy + 20).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("font-size", "12px").attr("fill", "#c74440").text("F");
    } else {
      const a = scale * 0.5;
      const b = a * Math.sqrt(e * e - 1);
      const c = a * e;
      const pts1 = d3.range(-2.0, 2.01, 0.05).map(t => [
        cx + a * Math.cosh(t), cy + b * Math.sinh(t)
      ]);
      const pts2 = d3.range(2.0, -2.01, -0.05).map(t => [
        cx - a * Math.cosh(t), cy + b * Math.sinh(t)
      ]);
      pts = pts1;
      svg.selectAll(".m1_branch2").remove();
      svg.append("path").attr("class", "m1_branch2")
        .attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(pts2))
        .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 3);
      focusGroup.append("circle").attr("cx", cx - c).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
      focusGroup.append("circle").attr("cx", cx + c).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 5).attr("fill", "#c74440");
      focusGroup.append("line").attr("x1", cx - w/2).attr("y1", cy - b/a * w/2)
        .attr("x2", cx + w/2).attr("y2", cy + b/a * w/2)
        .attr("stroke", "#999").attr("stroke-dasharray", "5,5").attr("stroke-width", 1);
      focusGroup.append("line").attr("x1", cx - w/2).attr("y1", cy + b/a * w/2)
        .attr("x2", cx + w/2).attr("y2", cy - b/a * w/2)
        .attr("stroke", "#999").attr("stroke-dasharray", "5,5").attr("stroke-width", 1);
    }

    if (e <= 1.05) {
      svg.selectAll(".m1_branch2").remove();
    }

    curvePath.attr("d", d3.line().curve(e < 0.99 ? d3.curveLinearClosed : d3.curveBasis)(pts));
  }

  const slider = document.getElementById("m1_morph_param");
  slider.addEventListener("input", () => update(+slider.value));

  let animTimer = null;
  document.getElementById("m1_morph_play").addEventListener("click", function() {
    if (animTimer) { clearInterval(animTimer); animTimer = null; this.textContent = "自动播放 ▶"; return; }
    this.textContent = "暂停 ⏸";
    let v = 0;
    slider.value = v;
    animTimer = setInterval(() => {
      v++;
      if (v > 100) { clearInterval(animTimer); animTimer = null; document.getElementById("m1_morph_play").textContent = "自动播放 ▶"; return; }
      slider.value = v;
      update(v);
    }, 80);
  });

  update(0);
})();
</script>
```

点击"自动播放"，观察曲线如何随着离心率 $e$ 的变化而连续变形：圆 → 椭圆 → 抛物线 → 双曲线。离心率是控制曲线"形状"的核心参数。

## 生活中的圆锥曲线

圆锥曲线不只存在于教科书中，它们在自然界和工程中无处不在。

### 卫星天线 — 抛物面反射器

卫星电视接收天线（"锅盖"）是一个**旋转抛物面**。抛物线有一个关键的反射性质：平行于对称轴的光线经抛物面反射后，全部汇聚到焦点。因此天线把来自卫星的平行电磁波集中到焦点处的接收器上，实现微弱信号的放大。这也是汽车前灯的原理——只不过反过来，从焦点发出的光经反射变成平行光束。

### 行星轨道 — 开普勒椭圆

开普勒第一定律：每颗行星沿**椭圆**轨道运行，太阳位于椭圆的一个焦点。地球的轨道离心率约为 $e \approx 0.0167$（非常接近圆），而哈雷彗星的离心率高达 $e \approx 0.967$（极扁的椭圆）。逃逸轨道则是抛物线（$e=1$）或双曲线（$e>1$）。

### 冷却塔 — 双曲面结构

发电厂的冷却塔通常采用**双曲面**外形（双曲线绕轴旋转得到的曲面）。这并非巧合——双曲面是一种**直纹面**，可以用直的钢筋和模板搭建，施工方便；同时其"腰部收窄"的形状在结构力学上非常高效，用最少的材料承受风力和自重。

### GPS定位 — 双曲线的距离差

GPS定位的数学原理与双曲线密切相关。接收器测量来自不同卫星的信号时间差，每一对卫星确定一条双曲线（到两点距离差恒定的点的轨迹），多条双曲线的交点就是你的位置。

::: {.callout-note}
## 圆锥曲线无处不在

- **行星轨道**是椭圆（开普勒第一定律），太阳在一个焦点上
- **抛体运动**的轨迹是抛物线（忽略空气阻力）
- **卫星天线**是抛物面，利用抛物线的反射性质
- **冷却塔**的轮廓是双曲线，因为双曲线的结构最省材料
- **GPS定位**利用了双曲线的距离差性质
:::

## Desmos探索

```{=html}
<div id="m1_01_desmos" class="desmos-container"></div>
<script src="https://www.desmos.com/api/v1.9/calculator.js?apiKey=dcb31709b452b1cf9dc26972add0fda6"></script>
<script>
  var m1_01_calc = Desmos.GraphingCalculator(document.getElementById('m1_01_desmos'), {
    expressions: true, settingsMenu: false
  });
  // Ellipse
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'a_val', latex: 'a = 3', sliderBounds: { min: 1, max: 5, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'b_val', latex: 'b = 2', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 5, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'ellipse', latex: '\\frac{x^2}{a^2} + \\frac{y^2}{b^2} = 1', color: '#2d70b3' });
  // Parabola
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'p_val', latex: 'p = 1', sliderBounds: { min: 0.2, max: 3, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'parabola', latex: 'y^2 = 4px', color: '#388c46' });
  // Hyperbola
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'h_a', latex: 'h = 2', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 4, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'h_b', latex: 'k = 1.5', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 4, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_01_calc.setExpression({ id: 'hyperbola', latex: '\\frac{x^2}{h^2} - \\frac{y^2}{k^2} = 1', color: '#c74440' });
  m1_01_calc.setMathBounds({ left: -8, right: 8, bottom: -6, top: 6 });
</script>
```

试着调节参数 $a$、$b$、$p$、$h$、$k$，观察三种曲线的形状如何变化。

## 参考视频

```{=html}
<div class="video-container"><iframe src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV14s41157M4&page=1" scrolling="no" border="0" frameborder="no" framespacing="0" allowfullscreen="true" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;"></iframe></div>
```

## 关键帧

![圆锥与切面的关系](../images/ch22/frame_01.jpg)

![不同角度产生不同曲线](../images/ch22/frame_02.jpg)

![三种圆锥曲线的对比](../images/ch22/frame_03.jpg)

![离心率与曲线类型](../images/ch22/frame_04.jpg)

## 本课要点

::: {.callout-important}
## 记住这些

1. **圆锥曲线**得名于用平面切圆锥：不同切面角度产生不同曲线
2. 切面**垂直于轴** → 圆；**倾斜但比锥面缓** → 椭圆；**平行于锥面** → 抛物线；**比锥面更陡** → 双曲线
3. **离心率** $e$ 是统一描述曲线类型的参数：$e=0$ 圆，$0<e<1$ 椭圆，$e=1$ 抛物线，$e>1$ 双曲线
4. 这四种曲线在自然界和工程中无处不在
5. **Dandelin球**证明了为什么截面满足椭圆的焦点定义：$|PF_1|+|PF_2|=\text{常数}$
6. 圆锥曲线的研究跨越两千年：从梅内赫莫斯到阿波罗尼乌斯，从开普勒到丹德兰
:::
